From: GBeck111@aol.com [mailto:GBeck111@aol.com]
Sent: Friday, December 22, 2006 1:17 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: (no subject)

Hi Jeffrey,
Miss you! Hope all is well -- I'm heading to South
America for the
holidays to explore new regions (and yes, I will be
staying with an
Argentinean polo player for a few days)....

Have been working with a group of investors to fund
small companies
(goat's milk ice cream, etc..) and ran across a
company with such huge
potential that I wanted to see if you're interested
before I give it to
them. (Because I really like you a lot better)....

The product basically shrinks the walls of the
vagina --- takes 20 years
off (forget botox). It really works (however, I
wish it was permanent).
They are in the development stage, still doing
clinical trials and have
a patent pending. Let me know if you have any
interest in the deal.
PK-24 some blogs if you google.

Lots and lots of Love,
Gwendolyn
